## Summary


## Decision

- [ ] Go

## Phase Or Milestone


## Required Evidence

- [ ] Linked issues or milestones are current.
- [ ] Required tests or checks pass.
- [ ] CI is green, or any CI exception is documented with a follow-up.
- [ ] Contract conformance is confirmed.
- [ ] Secrets and environment-specific values are absent from the diff.
